message:
test: add cross-module integration test for backpressure → tier → priority

Exercises the full resource allocation pipeline: BackpressureManager
evaluates queue depths, PaneTierClassifier assigns activity tiers with
backpressure-scaled polling intervals, and PriorityClassifier produces
final resource priorities from tier + output rate + detection signals.

7 tests covering: escalation flow, tier→priority handoff, pause/resume
lifecycle, high-throughput priority elevation, telemetry coherence,
manual overrides, and interval monotonicity invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
